nodes.title: Knowledge Curation
nodes.description: The practice of keeping a knowledge base accurate, linked, searchable, and useful for human and agent work.
nodes.excerpt: Knowledge Curation Knowledge curation is the ongoing work of turning raw information into durable, connected knowledge. Hygiene Checks - Required metadata exists. - Source links are preserved. - Internal links resolve. - Tags are specific e...

nodes.title: LLM Wiki
nodes.description: A file-based knowledge workspace that lets agents maintain durable, navigable context over time.
nodes.excerpt: LLM Wiki The LLM Wiki pattern keeps knowledge in human-readable files so agents can search, edit, and cite durable context instead of relying only on transient chat history. Local Interpretation For this project, the wiki is a folder of Mar...

nodes.title: Open Knowledge Format
nodes.description: A Markdown and YAML-frontmatter format for portable knowledge packages.
nodes.excerpt: Open Knowledge Format Open Knowledge Format standardizes the idea of a portable knowledge package using a directory of Markdown files with structured frontmatter. Local Interpretation This project uses a compact OKF-compatible subset: - `ty...

nodes.title: Karpathy OKF Wiki Lab Index
nodes.description: Entry point for a local LLM-wiki inspired OKF knowledge base.
nodes.excerpt: Karpathy OKF Wiki Lab This knowledge base experiments with a local, agent-maintained wiki. It uses Markdown as the durable substrate and a generated HTML viewer for search, graph exploration, and hygiene checks. Starting Points - [LLM Wiki]...

nodes.title: Curation Log
nodes.description: Append-only log for notable knowledge-base changes and review decisions.
nodes.excerpt: Curation Log 2026-06-19 - Initialized local OKF profile and knowledge-base structure. - Added source pages for Karpathy LLM Wiki and Google OKF. - Added concept pages for LLM Wiki, OKF, and knowledge curation.
